title: CalTrack
problem: Users struggle to consistently log food and workouts and to understand their daily calorie balance across meals and exercise. Existing consumer apps are either bloated or privacy-invasive.
approach: Built a secure Next.js app with a Prisma + PostgreSQL backend, NextAuth for authentication, and integrations to USDA FoodData Central and an exercise API to auto-calculate nutrition and calories. Implemented robust server-side validation, Prisma migrations, and deployed to Render with CI and migration hooks.
impact: Enabled accurate food and workout logging for pilot users (privacy-first, self-hostable).
Reduced authentication-related production failures by addressing env/secret misconfiguration (e.g., switching to NEXTAUTH_* env names).
Automated database migrations and Prisma client generation in CI, improving deploy reliability.

title: FinTech Intelligence & Risk Analytics
tagline: AI-driven financial intelligence and risk monitoring dashboard
problem: Financial institutions and analysts lacked a unified platform to monitor fraud risks, AML activities, UPI growth trends, and market intelligence in a single lightweight system.
approach: Built a modular Streamlit-based analytics dashboard integrating fraud detection, AML verification, market analysis, and UPI forecasting modules. Designed each feature as an independent Python module with scalable architecture and real-time visualization support.
impact: Unified multiple FinTech intelligence workflows into a single dashboard
Interactive visualizations for fraud monitoring and market insights
Modular architecture enabling rapid addition of new analytics modules

title: TimeVault
tagline: Decentralized time-locked secret messaging on Ethereum
problem: Traditional messaging platforms cannot guarantee censorship resistance, decentralized storage, or cryptographic time-based access control for sensitive communication.
approach: Developed a full-stack decentralized application using Solidity smart contracts, React, and IPFS to enable users to send encrypted time-locked messages. Leveraged blockchain-based unlock conditions and decentralized storage through Pinata/IPFS to ensure secure, low-cost, and tamper-resistant message delivery.
impact: Implemented decentralized time-based message unlocking using Ethereum smart contracts
Reduced on-chain storage costs by storing encrypted content on IPFS
Built a modular Web3 frontend with wallet authentication and real-time countdown tracking

title: Convos
tagline: Real-time multi-user chat platform for seamless communication
problem: Modern communication platforms require low-latency messaging and synchronized conversations, but many lightweight chat solutions lack scalable real-time interaction features.
approach: Developed a real-time chat application using WebSocket-based communication to enable instant message delivery, live room interactions, and synchronized user conversations. Designed a responsive frontend with efficient backend event handling for smooth real-time updates.
impact: Enabled instant real-time communication between multiple users
Implemented room-based messaging architecture for organized discussions
Delivered responsive and interactive user experience with live updates

title: Talking rabbitt
tagline: Ask questions about your data in plain English. Get instant answers and visualizations.
approach:
Upload CSV → LLM interprets question → safe pandas execution → optional Plotly chart → return answer + visualization.
